retained_fix.change: Disable TileLang aggressive shared-memory merge for bwd_export_hsk_directdq.
retained_fix.reason: The merge pass corrupted the persistent Q shared tile after the first selected block. The diagnostic showed dO.KV was correct while Q.KV was wrong for compressed slots.

candidate_results.read: Correct source-HSK bridge, but it still materializes BF16 probability and scaled-dP HSK slabs and reads them back in the selected-limit reducer.
This is the closest existing whole-boundary source kernel: it consumes q, dO, kv, indices, lse, and delta directly and avoids HSK slabs, but it still performs per-selected-row global dKV atomics.
Route/group-owned direct-source reducer avoids HSK slabs and reduces before global atomics, but it recomputes full-D QK/PV inside route-owned CTAs and destroys query-major reuse.
Changing the export slab to producer-owned BSHK layout did not reduce export time and made the reducer bridge worse because it still had to transpose/copy back to HSK.
D-blocked direct-source reducer avoids HSK slabs and keeps a small tile-local group accumulator, but repeating QK/PV for every D block loses to direct atomics.
Increasing D block size to reduce repeated QK/PV recompute failed at HIP module launch with invalid argument, likely resource/shared-memory pressure.

stage_split.read: The reducer body is plausible, especially compressed dKV at about 8.7 ms, but the HSK export boundary is about 34.8 ms and cannot be promoted.

but_not_as: HSK slab export plus selected-limit reducer
D-blocked source recompute with repeated full-D QK/PV
next_kernel_contract: Keep query-major row recompute for QK, probabilities, scaled dP, and dQ.
Do not write probability or scaled-dP HSK slabs to HBM.
Within the query-major producer, accumulate dKV contributions into tile-local grouped/segmented partials keyed by compressed group.
Emit reduced compact partial rows or reduced atomics, then use a small final reduce/scatter.
Preserve no-selected-KV saved-tensor contract: inputs are q, dO, kv, indices, output/lse, and sink/delta.
decision.expected_first_gate: Beat 42.5 ms direct atomic at S4096 without HSK slabs, then beat the older 8.0-8.8 ms compressed dKV atomic wall for the dKV slice before e2e TFLOPs A/B.
decision.e2e_status: No e2e TFLOPs promotion yet; current TileLang candidates are diagnostic or rejected for target latency.
